description: A provenance ledger demonstrating that numerical outputs descending from raw finite-Gamma (pre-IBP seven-kernel) are RETAINABLE_BASELINE, while numerical outputs derived from the invalidated historical reduced formula require RECOMPUTE_REQUIRED.

baselines.source: raw finite-Gamma integrand through seven-kernel checkpoint
baselines.reason: Numerical computation descends from pre-IBP seven-kernel formula (trusted). The invalidation of the historical pair reduction does not affect this derivation path.

baselines.source: historical closed form (invalidated descendant of wrong pair reduction)
baselines.derivation_path: raw → decomposition → seven_kernel → historical_pair_reduction → historical_closed_form → numerical evaluation
baselines.reason: Numerical computation descends from invalidated historical closed form (superseded). The invalidation of the pair reduction taints this derivation path. Recompute using repaired closed form.

note: No large numerical datasets are included. Only parameter metadata (names, ranges, point count) and result fingerprints are preserved for the public benchmark.The full 80-parameter grid data is available in the 016 freeze for independent verification.
